display_text: Dark Willow Aghanim's Scepter: Shadow Realm attacks no longer break invisibility. This is a powerful counter to initiation detection, allowing Dark Willow to deal sustained burst damage while remaining untargetable.
search_text: Dark Willow Aghanim Scepter Shadow Realm counter-initiation invisibility burst damage

display_text: Dark Willow Aghanim's Shard: Cursed Crown spawns brambles upon expiration or dispel. This upgrade counters clumped positioning and dispels, punishing enemies for grouping up or attempting to remove the debuff, while also enhancing area denial.
search_text: Dark Willow Aghanim Shard Cursed Crown brambles counter-clumping dispel area denial
